---
title: "10. 火攻、用间与外部信息干预"
subtitle: "Fire Attack, Intelligence, and Exogenous Intervention"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 10
categories: [sunzi, cultural, omega]
description: "How 火攻 and 用间 culminate Sunzi's theory in decisive outside perturbation and privileged access to hidden state."
---

**Chapters:** 火攻第十二, 用间第十三, 谋攻第三  
**Omega Directions:** `rate-distortion information theory`, `fold operator`, `spectral theory`

{{< include articles/category_10_fire_attack_intelligence_exogenous_intervention.md >}}

---

[Back to Sunzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
